likely_causes: TPR/FPR disparities are flagged for the gender attribute.
limits: Estimates for groups with small sample sizes (e.g., Amer-Indian-Eskimo, Asian-Pac-Islander) may be unstable.
narrative_markdown:
# Fairness Audit Narrative
## What we found
No demographic disparities were detected in the selection rates of gender and age_group attributes.
## Evidence (numbers)
No evidence of demographic disparities was found in the fairness report.
## Likely causes (hypotheses)
TPR/FPR disparities are flagged for the gender attribute.
## Recommended next tests
- run_feature_distribution_comparison
## Mitigations to consider
No mitigations are necessary at this time.
## Limits / Unknowns
Estimates for groups with small sample sizes (e.g., Amer-Indian-Eskimo, Asian-Pac-Islander) may be unstable.
